name: filled
label: 面性单色 / Filled
preamble: Solid flat filled glyphs in ONE single colour, no outlines, no gradients, gently rounded corners. A calm, restrained monochrome brand set — every icon the exact same colour.

construction.grid: 24-unit keyline; live area ~80%, ~10% padding; optical sizing
construction.fill_rule: single solid fill, no outline; interior holes kept open
construction.color_rule: one colour across the whole set
construction.shared_parts: reuse one canonical shape per recurring concept

notes: Large filled shapes read heavy in bulk — reserve for small or sparse placements, not grids of cards. Lock the single hex or the model adds extra colours.
